title: The best and worst Evangelion games
display_title: The best and worst Evangelion games
wikitext:
[]: The best and worst Evangelion games             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue May 27, 2014 4:38 pm There sure are a lot of them, which do you think are the best and which do you think are the worst.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Tue May 27, 2014 7:32 pm Probably the best are Neon Genesis Evangelion 2 and Super Robot Wars (When they appear at least). The worst is probably The Raising Ayanami Project.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Wed May 28, 2014 7:03 am How dare you, that's one of the good games. I have really enjoyed what I have seen so far in the game, could you at least say why you don't like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dodgy » Wed May 28, 2014 8:17 am Neon Genesis Evangelion for the Nintendo 64 was pretty cool for it's time even if it didn't get a release outside of Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Wed May 28, 2014 9:25 am Yea, it looks pretty awesome in an emulator. Other than that the controls are terrible, anyone heard about the gameboy game (I think) where you play as Kaji and create Adam. I saw it on a russian fansite and was like what the hell, there was also some SNES slideshows of pornographic materials with nipples drawn. Is that even legal on a SNES and has anyone heard of those either, just wanted to bring it up up. My guess is that they were sold behind the counters like pirated multi carts in the US and asia.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat May 31, 2014 12:16 am I'm just not a big fan of Rei, not even the Asuka story could save it for me.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Sat May 31, 2014 7:10 am Is that it, because you don't like the characters. Anyone know about the other games I mentioned.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Jun 02, 2014 6:42 am The simultaneous best and worst Eva game is Girlfriend of Steel. Worst because MANA KIRISHIMA, no Rei ending, terrible "gameplay" and horrendous canon defilement. Best because Kensuke plane noises, Unit 00 fishing, The disguise scene and horrendous canon defilement. Seek it out. Play it. Now.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jun 02, 2014 7:03 am ^ You forgot the Kaji crossdressing.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Jun 02, 2014 7:04 am ElMariachi wrote: ^ You forgot the Kaji crossdressing.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon Jun 02, 2014 3:15 pm Chasing dudes isn't my thing, I think I'll pass on Girlfriend of Steel for the moment. Probably will check it out some time in the future though.
